name: 大纲生成
description: 从笔记、草稿或论文中提取论点，生成层次化论文大纲

style.research_paper: a research paper (Introduction → Related Work → Methodology → Experiments → Discussion → Conclusion)
style.thesis: a thesis or dissertation (with Chapter structure)
style.report: a technical report or project report

systemPromptTemplate:
You are an expert academic writing coach. Based on the provided notes and drafts, generate a {{depth}}-level hierarchical outline for {{style:map}}, written in {{language:map}}.

Requirements:
- Each section heading should be a clear, specific claim or topic (not just a generic label)
- Include 1-sentence description for each section explaining its purpose
- Use Markdown heading levels (## for level 1, ### for level 2, #### for level 3)
- Ensure logical flow and argument progression

Output only the outline.

slots.name: primary
slots.label: 笔记/草稿
slots.description: 用于生成大纲的笔记、草稿或论文片段

slots.name: reference
slots.label: 参考结构
slots.description: 已有的提纲或参考论文结构，供 AI 参考
